preFix.title: Expansion Continues With Ease
preFix.subtitle: An affirmation for holding growth as a natural, generous, and aligned continuation of what has already been built
preFix.excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 83 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names expansion not as ambition or pressure but as a natural next step that carries generosity forward.
preFix.sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 83 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 83 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 83: commit to continued growth and giving. The statement holds growth as something that carries generosity with it, not a demand to do more.
Say it three times in the morning, hand on heart. Let it settle before the day begins.
I allow expansion to continue with ease, generosity, and alignment.
Adapted from the Day 83 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow.

initialFindings.message: paragraph reads at grade 13.1 (qc threshold: 11) — simplify (target grade 6-8)
